\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5526 introduces Lagrangian as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \mathcal{L}(t) = \mathcal{L}_0 + \varepsilon\,\mathcal{L}_1\bigl(\hat{\mathbf{n}}(t)\bigr). \end{equation}
